positive: A celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, with the owl rendered in sharp, detailed silhouettes of various astronomical elements (stars, nebulae, constellations). The style should be inspired by Art Deco celestial maps meeting modern minimalist illustration. Composition must be perfectly centered, featuring strong contrast between deep midnight blue, shimmering gold, and luminous teal accents. The composition should be highly adaptable for apparel printing, with clean, solid color areas and no complex gradients that blur when printed. Cinematic, vector-like quality, 4k print quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, smudge, gradients, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, celebrity likenesses, artist names, photorealism
